name.description: Name of the load balancer. This name must be unique within your AWS account.

name_prefix.description: Prefix for the name of the load balancer.

access_logs.description: An Access Logs block containing S3 bucket configuration for access logs.

availability_zones.description: List of availability zones to deploy the load balancer.

security_groups.description: List of security group IDs to assign to the LB.

subnets.description: List of subnet IDs to attach to the LB.

instances.description: List of instance IDs to attach to the LB.

internal.description: If true, the LB will be internal. Defaults to false.

listener.description: A listener block containing the protocol and port configuration for the LB.
listener.type: list(object({ instance_port:number, instance_protocol:string, lb_port:number, lb_protocol:string, ssl_certificate_id:string }))

health_check.description: A health check block containing the protocol and port configuration for the LB.
health_check.type: list(object({ target:string, interval:number, timeout:number, healthy_threshold:number, unhealthy_threshold:number }))

cross_zone_load_balancing.description: If true, cross-zone load balancing will be enabled.

idle_timeout.description: The time in seconds that the connection is allowed to be idle.

connection_draining.description: If true, connection draining will be enabled.

connection_draining_timeout.description: The time in seconds to wait for a connection to drain.

desync_mitigation_mode.description: The desync mitigation mode for the LB.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.
